curation_notes: Patch commit ec65c0015 identified from git log of the v7.0.0 release tag by commit message 'incusd/storage/s3: Fix nil pointer dereference on truncated input'. Only 1 non-test source file changed (internal/server/storage/s3/transfer_manager.go). Location derived from the patch diff: the fix replaces the EOF-only check with a general error check in the UploadAllFiles function's tar iteration loop. No sibling files in the s3/ directory contain a similar tar iteration pattern. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed from CWE-476 and the patch clearly adding a nil/error guard before hdr.Name access.
